gate_definitions.current_evidence: The same pair/side/method remains negative after TP-progress repair because no executable profit candidate or acceptable geometry exists.
gate_definitions.exact_clearing_condition: The matching family disappears from a refreshed 744h replay, or exact local TP/geometry/forecast proof makes the filtered replay non-negative and order_intents no longer carry residual metadata.
gate_definitions.verifier_riskengine_liveordergateway_imp: GPT verifier and RiskEngine block residual metadata; LiveOrderGateway receives no LIVE_READY receipt for matching families.

gate_definitions.current_evidence: The TP-progress diagnostic row remains negative or below bid/ask/noise proof after the repair replay.
gate_definitions.exact_clearing_condition: Spread-included non-negative replay plus current production-gate evidence removes the matching residual family.
gate_definitions.verifier_riskengine_liveordergateway_imp: The family is historical-only until the exact repair proof is refreshed and acceptance clears.

replay_after_residual_family_filters.basis: Same 744h replay after blocking every negative pair/side/method residual family from fresh permission.

replay_before_residual_family_filters.basis: durable TP-progress harvest gate evidence after EUR_USD market-close family/manual exclusions when available

source_harvest_gate_evidence.basis: Replay uses all audited loss closes. Triggered rows use executable TP-progress counterfactual P/L; non-triggered rows keep actual P/L. Proposed gates remove the exact market-close leak family and operator-manual trade ids from future system-edge accounting.
